description:
Add two new supplier records into NCH Copper Point of Sale with complete contact and business details for the following vendors:

Supplier 1:
- Company Name: Pacific Coast Distributors
- Contact Name: Margaret Chen
- Phone: (503) 555-0147
- Email: orders@pacificcoastdist.com
- Address: 2847 Industrial Parkway, Portland, OR 97201
- Notes/Comments: Net 30 payment terms. Minimum order $500.

Supplier 2:
- Company Name: Heartland Wholesale Supply
- Contact Name: Robert Flanagan
- Phone: (816) 555-0293
- Email: sales@heartlandwholesale.com
- Address: 1150 Commerce Drive, Kansas City, MO 64108
- Notes/Comments: COD or Net 15. Weekly delivery Tue/Thu.

Ensure both records are saved and appear in the supplier list.
